articles.title: India’s Oil Demand Growth Set for Pandemic Low on War Crunch
articles.summary: India’s oil demand growth this year could tumble to its lowest level since the pandemic as the fallout from the Middle East conflict saps fuel consumption in the world’s third-biggest crude importer.

articles.title: Gold Edges Lower as Uncertainty Clouds Talks to End US-Iran War
articles.summary: Gold edged lower as renewed clashes in the Middle East cast doubt over negotiations between the US and Iran to end the war that’s upended energy flows and heightened inflation concerns.

articles.title: Asian Stocks Rise to Record, Yen Trades Near 160: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: Asian stocks climbed to a record as investors doubled down on the artificial-intelligence trade that has powered global equities to all-time highs. The yen hovered near 160 per dollar.

articles.title: Marcos Says Philippines May Need Extra Budget Amid Oil Shock
